items.title: Bird
items.description: Capable of control their own blood, to shoot, manifest habilities, use as crude weapons and even fly

items.title: Insect
items.description: They have a hidden organ that sprouts into a specialized pseudopod, their form varies greatly

items.title: Feathers
items.description: Use their blood as projectiles, usually with a secondary effect

items.title: Talons
items.description: Use their blood as tendrils or tools with dangerous power

items.title: Bones
items.description: Focus into imbue their body with strenght, having an incredible strength, speed and regeneration

items.title: Mimicry
items.description: Emulate other supernatural they saw beings habilities within a limit

items.title: Egg
items.description: Seeds ravenous organ into a normal mortal and empowers other ravenous

items.title: Wings
items.description: Control their body to fly

items.title: Eyes
items.description: Supress and hurt the blood flow of another

items.title: Wings
items.description: Sproting out their shoulder length, it's high range a speed type that can sprout wings to fly and attack and shoot with razor sharp feathers

items.title: Carapace
items.description: Sproting out their shoulder plate length, a low range defensive type, it has a tough outer shell that provides protection and can be used as a weapon

items.title: Claws
items.description: Sproting out their middle back length, a offensive type, usually sprouting into middle range tentacles, powerful and have the highest regeneration

items.title: Stinger
items.description: Sproting out their tail length, all rounder and usually best at surprise attacks

items.title: Resilience
items.description: Even for a revenous, the body far exceds the limits of punishment

items.title: Potence
items.description: Much stronger, faster and agressive than other ravenous

items.title: Venom
items.description: The sprout is capable to produce a secondary effect, usually a poision with various simptoms but not limited by it

items.title: Detatchment - Wall
items.description: A piece imbeds and spreads through an area and block it

items.title: Detatchment - Trap
items.description: A piece buries and burst into piercing torns on contact or command

items.title: Detatchment - Signal
items.description: A piece turns into a drone and transmits information to another

items.title: Detatchment - Bundle
items.description: A piece turns restraining cords to hold another

items.title: Detatchment - Drone
items.description: A piece turns into a drone and attacks the target

items.title: completion
items.description: Has the complete stage, having a carapace body armor and even higher resistence

items.title: Quimera
items.description: Has other sprout
